---
name: Tool Request
about: Request a new tool or an extension to an existing tool
title: "[Tool Request] "
labels: tool-request
assignees: ''
---

## What task are you trying to accomplish?
<!-- Describe the repetitive task in plain language. What do you do, how often, and why? -->


## What input do you have?
<!-- e.g., polygon WKT file, list of ticket IDs, coordinates, CSV, etc. -->


## What output do you need?
<!-- e.g., CSV report, Slack summary, map overlay, yes/no answer, etc. -->


## Is there an existing tool that's close?
<!-- Check the tools/ directory. If something does 70%+ of what you need, name it here — we prefer to extend rather than create. -->
- [ ] I checked existing tools and nothing fits
- [ ] Tool `________` is close but missing `________`

## How often do you do this task?
- [ ] Daily
- [ ] Weekly
- [ ] Monthly
- [ ] Ad-hoc but frequent enough to automate

## Any other context?
<!-- Screenshots, example files, links to Slack threads, etc. -->
